content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Array with Odd Sum". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1296/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer N, the size of the array. The next line contains N space-separated integers, the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print 'YES' if it's possible to obtain an array with an odd sum by changing at most one element, otherwise print 'NO'.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check if the sum of the array is odd, if it is, print 'YES'. If not, check if changing one element can make the sum odd.
